creditsUpdateNotice: Note: credit status may take a moment to update.

errorBoundary.title: Sorry, that shouldn't have happened!
errorBoundary.description: There was an error loading the app...
errorBoundary.workaround: Try closing and re-opening Dyad as a temporary workaround.

help.aiIssuesDescription: Best for AI quality issues. Uploads your chat session and code for the team to reproduce and fix the problem.
help.openChatToUpload: Open a chat first to upload a session.
help.nonAiIssuesDescription: Includes error logs to troubleshoot non-AI issues with Dyad (UI bugs, crashes, setup problems, etc.).
help.failedToUploadChatSession: Failed to upload chat session. Please try again or report manually.
help.failedToUploadChatLogs: Failed to upload chat logs. Please try again.

notifications.title: Allow Notifications on macOS
notifications.description: If you didn't receive a test notification, you may need to allow notifications for Dyad in macOS. Here are two ways to do it:
notifications.option1: Option 1: From the Notification Permission Prompt
notifications.permissionPrompt: Click the "Options" dropdown on the notification and select "Allow".
notifications.systemSettings: Open System Settings → Notifications → Application Notifications → Dyad and enable "Allow Notifications".
